title: EEMB 20 PACK 2450 CR2450 Coin Button Cell 3V 3 Volt Lithium Batteries Battery Child Resistance Safety Package
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: CERTIFICATIONS—This is not a rechargeable battery. DO NOT Charge battery. UN 38.3 compliant. More than 400 EEMB battery models are UL certified. Search "MH20555" on UL for all EEMB UL certification information.

APPLICATION—EEMB CR2450 batteries suitable for remote control, security sensor, wireless thermometers, alarm system sensors, garage door remote, electronic candles, tea lights, clocks, watches, laser pens, fitness appliances, calculators, car key remote, security system, key fob, etc.

POWER LONGEVITY & ENERGY-SAVING—EEMB coin batteries are safe, environmentally friendly, free of mercury, high pressure and high energy density. Operating temperature range: -20℃ to + 60℃. Durable for long lasting performance. Less than 3% per year at room temperature. Long effective period. Superior high-speed pulse discharge characteristics. Continuous discharge stability. Will not leak in equipment during use and for two years after placed in equipment.

QUALITY SERVICE—Global technical support. We take pride in providing the highest levels of customer satisfaction and we have over 20 years experience in lithium battery business. If you have any questions or concerns regarding our products, please send us a message and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Specification: CR2450 li-MnO2 Coin Battery Non-rechargeable Battery capacity: 650 mAh Working voltage: 3 V Rated current: 0.4 mA Temperature range: -20 to + 60 ° C Diameter: 24.5mm Thickness: 5.0mm Weight: 6.2 g Application: Electronic scales, electronic dictionaries, car key remotes, electronic watches, thermometers, electronic kits, blood glucose meters, toys and some small appliances. Attention: Keep the battery out of the reach of children. If swallowed, seek medical attention immediately. Do not charge, disassemble, deform, short circuit, heat, set fire, etc. Do not reverse the polarity. Do not solder the battery directly. Do not mix new batteries, old batteries that have been used, or batteries of different brands or types. When discarding or storing the battery, insulate it with tape.
